I did not make any changes to the repository.

Renaming `build` to `render` in `BalanceCard` produces two analyzer errors:

- `Missing concrete implementation of 'StatelessWidget.build'`
- `The method doesn't override an inherited method`

`BalanceCard` extends `StatelessWidget` from `flutter_shim`, and `StatelessWidget` declares an abstract `build(BuildContext)` method. So `build` must remain named `build` in `BalanceCard` to satisfy the framework contract. Renaming only `BalanceCard`'s method would break the class without also changing the base class and every other `StatelessWidget` subclass.

I verified the repo is back to its original state:

- `dart analyze` passes with no issues
- `dart run test/all_tests.dart` passes with ALL TESTS OK

I did not make any changes.
